title: Share a lesson learned
subtitle: Connect experience with advice.
overview: Module: Story and Experience. B1 Core develops balanced English: stronger stories, clearer opinions, practical writing, conversation repair, native-style input, and confident spoken output.

sections.title: B1 core focus
rows: When you share a lesson learned, you turn experience into useful advice.
当你分享学到的经验时，你把经历变成了有用建议。
Useful frame: background, key moment, result, and what it means now.
实用框架：背景、关键时刻、结果，以及它现在的意义。
Share one lesson you learned from experience.
分享你从经历中学到的一条经验。
What I learned is that I should not wait until I feel ready to speak. Next time, I will start with simple sentences and build from there.
我学到的是，我不应该等到觉得准备好了才开口。下次，我会从简单句开始，再慢慢扩展。

items.en: When you share a lesson learned, you turn experience into useful advice.
items.zh: 当你分享学到的经验时，你把经历变成了有用建议。

items.en: Useful frame: background, key moment, result, and what it means now.
items.zh: 实用框架：背景、关键时刻、结果，以及它现在的意义。

items.en: What I learned is that I should not wait until I feel ready to speak. Next time, I will start with simple sentences and build from there.
items.zh: 我学到的是，我不应该等到觉得准备好了才开口。下次，我会从简单句开始，再慢慢扩展。

items.en: I can say this slowly first, then again with a more natural rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以先慢速说这句，然后再用更自然的节奏说一遍。

items.en: The goal is not a perfect sentence; the goal is a useful sentence I can actually say.
items.zh: 目标不是完美句子；目标是我真的能说出来的有用句子。

items.en: I will keep the main idea clear and add only the details that help.
items.zh: 我会保持主要意思清楚，只加入有帮助的细节。

items.en: If I get stuck, I can repair the sentence and continue.
items.zh: 如果我卡住了，我可以修正句子并继续说。

items.en: This lesson should become part of my spoken English, not just something I understand.
items.zh: 这节课应该变成我口语的一部分，而不只是我理解的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Share one lesson you learned from experience.
lines.zh: 分享你从经历中学到的一条经验。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: What I learned is that I should not wait until I feel ready to speak. Next time, I will start with simple sentences and build from there.
lines.zh: 我学到的是，我不应该等到觉得准备好了才开口。下次，我会从简单句开始，再慢慢扩展。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say the same idea more simply?
lines.zh: 你能把同一个意思说得更简单吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the key idea, one reason, and one example.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留核心意思、一个原因和一个例子。

items.en: Share one lesson you learned from experience.
items.zh: 分享你从经历中学到的一条经验。

items.en: Make one version about your real life.
items.zh: 做一个关于你真实生活的版本。

items.en: Record it once slowly and once at normal speed.
items.zh: 慢速录一遍，再用正常速度录一遍。

items.en: Listen again and improve one thing: clarity, rhythm, or detail.
items.zh: 再听一遍，并改进一个方面：清晰度、节奏或细节。

items.en: Use the best sentence again tomorrow so it becomes automatic.
items.zh: 明天再次使用最好的句子，让它变得自动化。
